canonical_format_string: [graphctx] register region source=%s name=%s base=0x%lx upper=0x%lx hot_pct=%u grasp_region=%d\n
tier_a_regex: \[graphctx\] register region source=(?P<source>\S+) name=(?P<name>\S+) base=0x(?P<base>[0-9a-fA-F]+) upper=0x(?P<upper>[0-9a-fA-F]+) hot_pct=(?P<hot_pct>\d+) grasp_region=(?P<grasp_region>\d+)
